summary: The generated implementation correctly outlines the core logic for enhanced error feedback in LMStudio model selection. However, it lacks specific UI/styling attributes for the `Warning` icon and `Tooltip` components, which are crucial for proper display and user interaction as seen in the reference implementation.

comments.line_reference: LMStudioModelSelection function, within the `if (loading || customModels.length == 0)` block
comments.comment:
The pseudo-code for introducing the `Warning` icon and `Tooltip` is missing several important attributes and styling details present in the reference implementation. These attributes are essential for correct visual presentation and user interaction. Specifically, the `Warning` icon requires `size={18}`, `className="text-red-400 cursor-pointer"`, and `data-tooltip-id="lmstudio-embedding-model"`. The `Tooltip` component needs `id="lmstudio-embedding-model"`, `place="top"`, `delayShow={300}`, `delayHide={400}`, `clickable={true}`, `className="tooltip !text-xs !opacity-100"`, and a `style` object for `maxWidth`, `whiteSpace`, and `wordWrap`. Additionally, the tooltip content should be wrapped in a `

` tag with specific classes (`className="text-xs leading-[18px] font-base"`).
comments.suggestion: Ensure the `Warning` icon and `Tooltip` are implemented with all the specified attributes and styling from the reference version to match the intended UI/UX.

comments.line_reference: LMStudioModelSelection function, within the `if (loading || customModels.length === 0)` block
comments.comment:
Similar to the embedding options, the pseudo-code for introducing the `Warning` icon and `Tooltip` in the LLM selection is missing critical attributes and styling details found in the reference implementation. These details are vital for the correct display and behavior of the error feedback. Specifically, the `Warning` icon requires `size={18}`, `className="text-red-400 cursor-pointer"`, and `data-tooltip-id="lmstudio-selected-model"`. The `Tooltip` component needs `id="lmstudio-selected-model"`, `place="top"`, `delayShow={300}`, `delayHide={400}`, `clickable={true}`, `className="tooltip !text-xs !opacity-100 z-99"`, and a `style` object for `maxWidth`, `whiteSpace`, and `wordWrap`. The tooltip content should also be wrapped in a `

` tag with specific classes (`className="text-xs leading-[18px] font-base"`).
comments.suggestion: Implement the `Warning` icon and `Tooltip` with all the necessary attributes and styling as shown in the reference version to ensure consistent and correct UI/UX.
